75: I thought he might have wandered this way to get a glimpse of the wheels up close, but I should've known better, no doubt he'd rather be tinkering with a ceruleum engine than taking in the sights.
I thought he might have wandered this way to get a glimpse of the wheels up close, but I should've known better─no doubt he'd rather be tinkering with a ceruleum engine than taking in the sights.
